name: python3-pythonjsonlogger
title: python3-pythonjsonlogger
summary: JSON library for Python logging framework
description:
JSON library for Python logging framework
This library is provided to allow standard Python logging to output log data
as json objects. With JSON, logs are more readable by machines and there is
no need to create custom parsers for syslog type records.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pythonjsonlogger because JSON library for Python logging framework.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pythonjsonlogger as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pythonjsonlogger with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pythonjsonlogger --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
